title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 7 - 2017: 100 feet above the middle of 40,000 people

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from his Boulder room on February 7, 2017, using a green screen setup to show aerial density visualizations of Boulder's population. He talks about sleeping 12 hours, adding fans to his bike, planning to sell his car, ordering a new microphone to fix audio quality issues, and spending the day cleaning and organizing his room.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: enthusiastic about showing different backgrounds each day
necessary fix after bad audio from computer fan noise
plans to sell it next week
loves the acoustics in his current room
